holdings.infoBox: HTEC is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Twist Bioscience stock at 3.22%, Axogen at 3.01%, Guardant Health at 2.76%, Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals at 2.53%, and Veracyte at 2.41%.

overview.description: The ROBO Global Healthcare Technology and Innovation ETF (HTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a proprietary index of global health care technology companies. HTEC was launched on Jun 25, 2019 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.

data.title: Industrial ETFs: Riding the Physical AI Supercycle
data.text: Investors once shrugged off industrials as slow-growth cyclical businesses that lagged tech at every turn. But the AI boom has driven a significant re-rating of the sector.
